name: Grassrootz API
description:
The Grassrootz API provides comprehensive REST endpoints for fundraising, events, fitness tracking, and more. Before you can interact with Grassrootz API you will need an API key which must be requested from a support representative.

## Authentication

The system uses a dual-key approach:
- **ClientKey**: Required for public endpoints  
- **ClientSecret**: Required alongside ClientKey for private/authenticated endpoints

Access keys grant the same permissions as an Organization Administrator in the admin portal.
